---
title: "R Markdown Quick Reference"
subtitle: "Keep this open during the workshop!"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
---

## Markdown Formatting

| Syntax | Result |
|--------|--------|
| `**bold**` | **bold** |
| `*italic*` | *italic* |
| `` `code` `` | `code` |
| `[link](url)` | [link](https://example.com) |
| `# Heading 1` | Level 1 heading |
| `## Heading 2` | Level 2 heading |
| `- item` | Bullet list |
| `1. item` | Numbered list |
| `> quote` | Block quote |
| `---` | Horizontal rule |

## Code Chunk Options

| Option | Effect |
|--------|--------|
| `echo=FALSE` | Hide code, show output |
| `eval=FALSE` | Show code, don't run it |
| `include=FALSE` | Run code silently |
| `message=FALSE` | Suppress messages |
| `warning=FALSE` | Suppress warnings |
| `fig.width=7` | Figure width (inches) |
| `fig.height=5` | Figure height (inches) |
| `fig.cap="..."` | Figure caption |
| `out.width="80%"` | Display width |

## Keyboard Shortcuts (Posit Cloud)

| Action | Windows/Linux | Mac |
|--------|--------------|-----|
| Knit document | Ctrl+Shift+K | Cmd+Shift+K |
| Insert chunk | Ctrl+Alt+I | Cmd+Option+I |
| Run chunk | Ctrl+Shift+Enter | Cmd+Shift+Enter |
| Run line | Ctrl+Enter | Cmd+Enter |

## Inline Code

Write `` `r knitr::inline_expr('mean(x)')` `` to insert R results in text.

## YAML Starter Template

````yaml
---
title: "Your Title"
author: "Your Name, NIEHS"
date: "`r knitr::inline_expr('Sys.Date()')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
---
````
